concerns.text: Typo in FR-003: 'System MUST execute the agent agent' contains a duplicated word 'agent'.
Typo in User Story 2 description: 'varying active skill library sizes. and record' contains a stray period before 'and'.

Terminology inconsistency: The text uses 'skills' in quotes immediately after 'library of overlapping Python functions', but later sections consistently use 'Skill' (capitalized) as a defined Key Entity. While minor, standardizing to 'Skill' or 'skill' without quotes improves consistency with the 'Key Entities' section.
